files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@
 - feat: expose message guid + reply_to_guid metadata in JSON output
 - fix: exclude reaction rows from history/watch output and tighten reaction matching
 - fix: reject reply_to_guid sends (AppleScript limitation)
+- fix: stabilize IMCore send initialization and handle resolution
 - test: add reply + reaction filtering coverage
 - feat: add send mode switch (applescript vs IMCore private API)
 - docs: add private API notes

@@ -175,15 +175,15 @@ public final class MessageStore: @unchecked Sendable {
           Message(
             rowID: rowID,
             chatID: chatID,
-            guid: guid,
-            replyToGUID: replyToGUID,
             sender: sender,
             text: resolvedText,
             date: date,
             isFromMe: isFromMe,
             service: service,
             handleID: handleID,
-            attachmentsCount: attachments
+            attachmentsCount: attachments,
+            guid: guid,
+            replyToGUID: replyToGUID
           ))
       }
       return messages
@@ -239,15 +239,15 @@ public final class MessageStore: @unchecked Sendable {
           Message(
             rowID: rowID,
             chatID: resolvedChatID,
-            guid: guid,
-            replyToGUID: replyToGUID,
             sender: sender,
             text: resolvedText,
             date: date,
             isFromMe: isFromMe,
             service: service,
             handleID: handleID,
-            attachmentsCount: attachments
+            attachmentsCount: attachments,
+            guid: guid,
+            replyToGUID: replyToGUID
           ))
       }
       return messages
